calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant International Sourcing Group, LTD, a business entity, form unknown.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:35 a.m.

Alison K. Hurley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Crown Building Maintenance Co., dba Able Building Maintenance Co., a California corporation.
Michael Coughlin, Director of Procurement for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Hurley and Mr. Coughlin appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant International Sourcing Group, LTD, a business entity, form unknown.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Indebitatus Assumpsit and Declaratory Relief was filed December 28, 2020.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were served via Certified Mail, with Return Receipt Requested, on defendant International Sourcing Group's Authorized Agent of Process on February 4, 2021.
Default as to defendant International Sourcing Group, LTD, a business entity, form unknown, was entered on May 18, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 7, 2021.

Plaintiff Crown Building Maintenance Co., dba Able Building Maintenance Co., a California corporation, submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Contract dated June 30, 2020...............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Crown Building Maintenance Co., dba Able Building Maintenance Co., a California corporation, and against the defaulted defendant International Sourcing Group, LTD, a business entity, form unknown, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,360.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,008.60.
Attorney Fees - $2,457.00.
Costs - $455.50.

Total - $93,281.10.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:48 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
